summary: Draft matching-progress PR touching Kirby fighter code, game-mode/menu code, stage code, and toy/menu helpers. The PR body claimed 34 matched functions and 7 failed candidates, but the loaded diff only shows 14 changed files and a subset of those matches. A bot report recorded 8 new matches but also a matched-code regression and many broken matches. An issue comment says the PR was replaced by #2322, #2323, #2324, and #2325.

key_files.role: Implemented several Kirby Neutral-B/Up-B functions, added includes, used GET_FIGHTER, motion-state transitions, effect spawn callbacks, item/fighter inhale distance checks, and a dont_inline pragma.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Kirby function descriptions and MWCC register allocation note

key_files.role: Implemented copied Jigglypuff Rollout collision transitions and turnaround helper; added extern ftCollisionBox.
Implemented bonus decision lookup and award routing for fn_80170110.
Updated prototypes for fn_80170110 and fn_801701C0 from unknown forms to typed signatures.
Implemented VS mode match-type cycling and configuration copyback.
evidence_refs: pr_body: VS Mode character select description

key_files.role: Implemented regular match clear time-based bonus calculation.
Updated fn_8017F09C prototype to s32 fn_8017F09C(void).
Renamed/implemented Icicle Mountain helper grIceMt_801F91EC and changed grAnime_801C7A04 arguments from -20 to 0 in that implementation.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Icicle Mountain joint animation/callback description

key_files.role: Updated grIceMt_801F91EC prototype with full argument list.
Implemented barrel cannon proximity search over item entities and added it_26B1 include.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Kongo Jungle barrel cannon description

key_files.role: Implemented name uniqueness check using valid persistent name entries and CompareNameStrings.
Updated IsNameUnique prototype to bool IsNameUnique(s32 slot).
Implemented controller stick-X reader loop for un_80305D00.
evidence_refs: pr_body: toy controller input reader description

key_files.role: Updated un_80305D00 prototype to float un_80305D00(void).

what_changed: Replaced decomp placeholder comments with C implementations in 9 loaded source files: ftKb_SpecialN.c, ftKb_SpecialNNs.c, gm_16F1.c, gm_1BA8.c, gmregclear.c, gricemt.c, grkongo.c, mnname.c, and toy.c.
Updated 5 headers to replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS or incomplete declarations with more specific signatures.
Renamed an Icicle Mountain helper from FUN_801f91ec to grIceMt_801F91EC in the loaded diff and header.
Added includes needed by new implementations: ft/ftanim.h, ftCommon/ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby.h, and it/it_26B1.h.
PR body claimed 34 100% matches and 7 failed candidates; loaded bot report showed only 8 new matches in its visible section and also reported 62 broken matches plus a -0.17% matched-code change.
smart_moves: Header prototypes were updated alongside recovered bodies, keeping declarations closer to the implementation evidence.
Several implementations used typed object access through Fighter, Ground, CSSData, VsModeData, Vec3, and callback types instead of leaving raw decompiler placeholders.
Distance comparisons in Kirby inhale and Kongo barrel search use squared distances against squared thresholds, avoiding unnecessary square roots and matching common game-code style.
The PR body explicitly documented failed match candidates and a Kirby MWCC register-allocation issue instead of presenting only successes.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When replacing a placeholder with a recovered body, update the owning header prototype in the same scope when the body proves return and argument types.
evidence_refs: diff: gm_16F1.h fn_80170110(void*, int, int, u8)

decomp_lessons.lesson: For simple repeated input/entity scans, natural for/while loops can express the recovered source shape: pad index loop in toy.c, persistent name slot loop in mnname.c, and item entity traversal in grkongo.c.
evidence_refs: diff: grKongo_801D8078 for cur = HSD_GObj_Entities->items; cur != NULL; cur = cur->next

decomp_lessons.lesson: A source-level match can still have broad blast radius; inspect bot/checkdiff output for neighbor regressions before treating a match-progress PR as clean.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report says Matched code 58.80% (-0.17%, -6740 bytes)
text_corpus: bot report lists 62 broken matches

naming_conventions.convention: Use subsystem-prefixed semantic names when supported by path and PR evidence, as with grIceMt_801F91EC for an Icicle Mountain stage helper.
evidence_refs: pr_body: gricemt.c described as Icicle Mountain stage helper

naming_conventions.convention: Keep address-style fn_/un_ names where loaded evidence does not prove a stronger semantic name, as with fn_80170110, fn_8017F09C, fn_80105978, and un_80305D00.
evidence_refs: diff: retained fn_ and un_ names

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A narrow #pragma dont_inline was placed before ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8, but the loaded evidence does not show an adjacent-function safety check; curate as a risky matching tactic rather than normal style.
evidence_refs: pr_body: ftKb_SpecialNDrink_Anim and ftKb_SpecialAirNDrink_Anim MWCC register allocation issue

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Re-fetching Fighter with GET_FIGHTER after Fighter_ChangeMotionState/ftAnim appears in Kirby Up-B entry functions, likely to keep the post-state-change object access shape explicit.
evidence_refs: diff: ftKb_SpecialHi_Enter reassigns fp = GET_FIGHTER(gobj) after ftAnim_8006EBA4
diff: ftKb_SpecialAirHi_Enter reassigns fp = GET_FIGHTER(gobj) after ftAnim_8006EBA4

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: For match-type cycling, modulo arithmetic and explicit wraparound branch both appear in the same function depending on direction.
evidence_refs: diff: gm_801BEDA8 decrements with wrap to 0x17, increments with (match_type + 1) % 24

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A goto label was used in fn_80170110 to share a flag-check tail after table search failure or success.
evidence_refs: diff: fn_80170110 uses goto check and check label

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev bot reported 8 new matches in the visible report section, but also reported matched code 58.80% (-0.17%, -6740 bytes) and 62 broken matches.
The PR was closed unmerged and an issue comment says it was replaced by #2322, #2323, #2324, and #2325.
No loaded human review comments were available; metadata reports review_comments: 0 and reviews: 0.

follow_up_queries: ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8 dont_inline MWCC register allocation GET_FIGHTER
ftKb_SpecialNDrink_Anim ftKb_SpecialAirNDrink_Anim victim_gobj callee-saved r28 r31

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, closed state, merged_at null, changed files
human_pr_text: PR body with match table, failed table, function descriptions, replacement comment
raw_diff: complete loaded diff for 14 changed files
notes: PR body claims 34 matched functions, but the loaded changed-file list and diff only include 14 files and a subset of the claimed matched functions.
The bot report excerpt conflicts with the PR body's broad success framing: it shows new matches but also many broken matches and an overall matched-code decrease.
No human review comments are loaded, so reviewer intent cannot be inferred.
The PR was closed unmerged and marked replaced by later PRs; do not treat its changes as accepted without checking replacement PRs or current source.
The raw PR JSON and text_corpus files are truncated, but the loaded diff is untruncated.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header prototypes should follow recovered bodies
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR repeatedly updated owning headers when replacing decomp placeholders with typed bodies, aligning with the existing truthful-headers standard.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Match claims need regression ledger
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR body lists many 100% matches, while the bot report records broad broken-match fallout. Curators should prefer narrow bot/checkdiff evidence over aggregate PR-body match lists.

source_update_candidates.title: Require extra scrutiny for pragma dont_inline in match-progress PRs
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2321 includes #pragma dont_inline before ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8 and the PR body mentions MWCC register-allocation issues in nearby Kirby functions. This supports reinforcing that dont_inline/register-allocation tactics should be documented with exact objdiff and adjacent-regression evidence, not treated as normal cleanup.
evidence_refs: pr_body: MWCC register allocation issue note
text_corpus: bot report shows broken matches
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards already cover matching tactics and pragmas; this PR is a concrete example candidate, but it should not become an accepted standard without curator review.

source_update_candidates.title: ftKb_SpecialN.c contains Kirby Neutral-B inhale and Up-B startup logic
source_update_candidates.text: The PR body describes ftKb_SpecialN.c as Kirby Neutral-B/Inhale logic plus Up-B/Final Cutter startup, and the diff implements ftKb_SpecialHi_Enter, ftKb_SpecialAirHi_Enter, item inhale distance, and fighter inhale distance helpers.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scope fact, but the PR was replaced and closed unmerged, so current source should be checked before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: ftKb_SpecialNNs.c includes copied Jigglypuff Rollout collision and turnaround logic
source_update_candidates.text: The PR body describes ftKb_SpecialNNs.c as Kirby's copied Jigglypuff Rollout handling collision transitions and a turnaround helper; the diff implements ftKb_PrSpecialAirNStart_Coll, ftKb_PrSpecialN_Coll, and fn_80105978.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for subsystem navigation; verify against replacement PRs/current source before accepting.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR body's 34 matched count as an accepted validation result because the bot report shows regressions and the PR was replaced.
Do not infer human reviewer approval; no loaded human review comments exist.
Do not treat #pragma dont_inline as accepted style from this PR; loaded evidence shows use and a rationale note, but not a complete adjacent-regression ledger.
Do not promote function descriptions for files listed only in the PR body but absent from the loaded diff as changed-file facts for this slice.
